title.en: Soon, he learned the names of these Invincible ...

content.en:
Ye Tian became the Ten Kings, and the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor canonized him, but not many people knew about this matter, and those Heavenly Kings and True Ancestors didn't know about it.

The only people who could participate in the Ten Kings canonization ceremony were the Ten Kings, the Invincible Dao Ancestors, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

Ye Tian was in the Shiwang Small Realm and was taken to another small realm, the Black Wind Mountain Small Realm.

Strictly speaking, this is the real Black Wind Mountain, and the top of the Black Wind Mountain outside is mostly an outer mountain.

In the endless dark void, Ye Tian saw a black giant mountain, this was the real Black Wind Mountain, even if he became the strongest Dao Ancestor, he didn't know where this small realm was hidden.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the Wind King, the Fire King, the Wood King, the Gold King, the Ice King, and the Time King, but they were not real people, but the incarnations of the Black Wind Mountain.

After all, if these six kings also left the Black Wind Mountain base, it would be easy to attract the attention of the outside world.

In addition to these six kings, Ye Tian also saw many incarnations of the invincible Dao Ancestor, one of which was the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor that Ye Tian knew.

At present, there are only six invincible Dao Ancestors born in Black Wind Mountain, but the number of invincible Dao Ancestors who participated in the canonization ceremony in front of him has reached ten, which makes Ye Tian very surprised.

Soon, he learned the names of these Invincible Dao Ancestors.

Ice Peak Dao Ancestor!

Capture the Shadow Dao Ancestor!

Dragon Phoenix Dao Ancestor!

Flying Feather Dao Ancestor!

Yuding Dao Ancestor!

Golden Buddha Daozu!

......

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor!

Ten invincible Dao Ancestors came to participate in Ye Tian's canonization ceremony, which made Ye Tian a little confused.

However, after learning that this is the rule of Black Wind Mountain, he is relatively indifferent.

On top of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, there are two half-step domain ancestors, the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor.

The canonization ceremony is very simple, first of all, the token is handed over, and the token of the Great Heavenly King is exchanged for the token of the Ten Kings.

According to the previous rules, if Ye Tian became the strongest Dao Ancestor and wanted to become the Ten Kings, he had to hold on to the attack of one of the Ten Kings for a long time, or he could inherit the throne of the Ten Kings without falling behind.

But now, four of the Ten Kings have fallen, and the previous Ten Kings naturally cannot re-inherit the title of the Ten Kings, so it can only be held by the new Supreme Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, Ye Tian could directly become the seventh ten kings of Black Wind Mountain.

"Ye Tian, Black Wind Mountain also has the titles of Earth King, Water King, Sky King and Dark King, which Ten Kings title do you choose?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor asked.

"I choose the Dark King!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said.

Immediately, the Eternal Dao Ancestor handed over the Dark King Order to Ye Tian, and after Ye Tian took the oath, he officially became the Dark King.

Abrupt.

Eternal Dao Ancestor pointed at Ye Tian's eyebrows, and a secret technique was introduced.

"Soul Inviolation!"

This is a secret technique that permanently blocks the origin memory of the soul, once practiced, no one else can absorb a trace of memory from his soul, this is the supreme secret technique of the Black Wind Mountain, and only the Ten Kings can grant it.

It is precisely because of this that people from the outside world never know the secrets and true strength of Black Wind Mountain, otherwise, the secrets of Black Wind Mountain would have been exposed long ago.

Subsequently.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian to the Black Wind Hall in the Black Wind Mountain.

Here, the Eternal Dao Ancestor personally told Ye Tian about some of the secrets of Black Wind Mountain, after all, at the level of the Ten Kings, Ye Tian was qualified to know the situation of Black Wind Mountain.

......

"Dark King, you are already one of the Ten Kings, and you are qualified to know most of the secrets, but some of the secrets are honest, even the Invincible Dao Ancestor can't know them, so it is impossible to tell you!" said the Eternal Dao Ancestor.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the Eternal Dao Ancestor said again: "First of all, you can know the general strength of Black Wind Mountain. At present, Black Wind Mountain has sixty-two supreme Dao Ancestors and twenty-one invincible Dao Ancestors, this is the real combat power, and there is no hiding from you. As for how many half-step domain ancestors there are, you can't know at the moment. But my Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor and I are currently half-step Domain Ancestors who often walk outside, so the members of Black Wind Mountain above the level of the Ten Kings are aware of it!"

Ye Tian was shocked at the moment.

Sixty-two Extremely Strong Dao Ancestors, twenty-one Invincible Dao Ancestors, such a number is too amazing.

"Do you think that our strength in Black Wind Mountain is very strong?"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

But suddenly, the Eternal Dao Ancestor sighed and said: "Actually, we had hundreds of supreme Dao Ancestors at the peak of Black Wind Mountain, and there were as many as fifty invincible Dao Ancestors, but it is a pity that the domain realm was shattered in a battle, you don't know how tragic it was, our Black Wind Mountain also forcibly participated in the war, not only the threat of the Vast Sea Ancestor, but also some other reasons, it is inconvenient to say." In short, Black Wind Mountain had killed far more than a few Ten Kings in the original battle. Those Nine Heavens forces actually suffered heavy losses, but since their battlefield was a marginal battlefield, the losses were not big compared to our Black Wind Mountain. Our Black Wind Mountain is the main battlefield connected to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, so the Heavenly Emperor Palace also roughly knows some of the strength of our Black Wind Mountain. In addition, when we were in the Dark Forbidden Domain, we also encountered very terrifying things in Black Wind Mountain, so the loss was not small. "

Then, the Eternal Dao Ancestor revealed another shocking news.

"In fact, our Black Wind Mountain is strictly divided into three veins: Wind Mountain, Black Mountain, and the real headquarters Black Wind Mountain, and each vein has a mountain owner. Now this branch of the Daoshan Realm is a branch of the Wind Mountain, but it is a pity that the outbreak of the battle was too sudden, and the other two veins are not in the Vast Sea Boundary, so we can't contact Black Mountain and the Black Wind Mountain Headquarters now. The strength of the three veins is actually about the same, and the headquarters is not much stronger than us, but we are all separated from the headquarters, so the headquarters of Black Wind Mountain is more orthodox. The plan of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is to promote the birth of the Forbidden Realm, and we also know it, but the fundamental reason why we can't stop it is that we also want to use the Forbidden Realm as a coordinate to attract the arrival of Black Mountain and the headquarters of Black Wind Mountain!"

"Black Mountain and Black Wind Mountain Headquarters are not having a good time in the Divine Heaven Realm, they have a great enemy, if they can come to the Dao Mountain Realm, it is also a good thing, and they can develop with peace of mind. Therefore, our goal is also to promote the birth of the Forbidden Realm, as long as the Heavenly Emperor Palace does not provoke us, we will not attack them!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor finished speaking.

Ye Tian asked curiously, "Eternal Dao Ancestor, is our Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain here?"

"In!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor replied: "However, you can't see the Wind Mountain Lord yet, unless you can step into the half-step domain ancestor level, understand?In addition, if you reach the invincible Dao Ancestor level one day, you can let your clone enter the forbidden Zerg lair to take an adventure, maybe you can get some benefits, there must be a lot of good things inside the Forbidden Zerg lair, but it's a pity that we, the half-step domain ancestors, don't dare to take risks!"

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, I know!"

Ye Tianying said.

Next, Ye Tian received the equipment belonging to the Dark King from Black Wind Mountain, no, it should be Wind Mountain, and also received a lot of resources.

What interests Ye Tian the most is that he can enter the Wind Mountain at any time to observe the perception of a half-step domain ancestor on the forbidden dao technique, those perceptions are engraved on the forbidden stone tablet, if you observe it carefully, there will always be some gains, which is very helpful for you to create the forbidden dao technique.
